title: Shannon Entropy: The Foundation of Information Theory
description: Master Shannon entropy - the fundamental measure of information and uncertainty that revolutionized communication theory and laid the groundwork for quantum information.
learningObjectives: Define Shannon entropy and explain its significance in information theory
Calculate entropy for discrete probability distributions
Understand the operational meaning of entropy as average information content
Prove key properties: non-negativity, concavity, and maximum entropy
Apply entropy to analyze information sources and compression limits
Connect classical entropy to quantum generalizations
